name: Oreo Ice Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup reduced fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
4 cups fat-free vanilla ice cream, slightly softened
1/2 cup reduced fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the crust, combine the cookie crumbs, granulated sugar, and oil in a mixing bowl.
2. Press the mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie pan.
3. To prepare the filling, spread the caramel topping over the crushed cookies.
4. Spread the softened ice cream evenly on top.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cookie crumbs over the surface.
6. Freeze for 4 hours or until firm.
